MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned from the Master Calendar by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Gail Lamchick, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Nathaniel Vergow.
Willaim Ginsburg, Esq. for Defendant: Toby Sherwood.
12:00 p.m. Parties and counsels are present and reached a settlement without reading into the record.
At request of cousels, copy of the agreement signed by the parties, placed in case file.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar Jan. 21, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212, for dismissal.
